create.title: Create New Secret Key

reveal.description: This is the only time your full secret key will be shown. Store it somewhere safe.

revoke.title: Revoke API Key
revoke.message: Are you sure you want to revoke "{name}"? Any application using it will immediately lose access. This cannot be undone.
